name: Chicken Tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim any excess fat from the chicken. Cut into cubes or thin slices.
2. In a medium-sized bowl, combine soy sauce, water, lemon juice, and chicken. Marinate for 15 minutes.
3. Heat sesame oil in a non-stick pan or wok over medium heat. Cook garlic for 1 minute until fragrant.
4. Add the marinated chicken to the pan and stir-fry until cooked through on all sides.
5. Sprinkle with dried tarragon leaves and season with salt and pepper. Stir to combine.
6. Serve with "Orzo and Pignoli" and "Minted Tomato Saute".
Food Exchange per serving: 4 LOW-FAT MEAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 164; CHO: 72mg; CAR: 72g; PRO: 27g; SOD: 368mg; FAT: 4g.
